snippet: Humfrey had a spotted head and [LINK] nose. He was a proud man.(wiki:Humfrey_Wagstaff.cite_ref-Raffc9.7B.7B.7B3.7...
When he was sixty-five, Humfrey was betrothed to a sixteen-year-old [LINK] , her third and final match. On the day of their [betrothal](wiki:Betrothal...
...agstaff was his name; a proud old man of five-and-sixty, with a nose like a [LINK] and a spotted head.(wiki:Humfrey_Wagstaff.cite_ref-Raffc9.7B.7B.7B3.7D.7D.7...
